name: figure
description: Local figure plugin for reconstructing diagram images into editable Visio deliverables.

interface.shortDescription: Rebuild diagram images as editable Visio figures.
interface.longDescription: Bundle local figure reconstruction skills for turning flowcharts, architecture diagrams, and paper-style module figures into editable Visio .vsdx files with exported SVG and PNG review assets.
defaultPrompt: Rebuild this diagram image as an editable Visio figure.
Convert this paper module figure into scene.json and .vsdx outputs.
Validate and render this Visio reconstruction scene.
